aril.note: The matching activity and location labels are stored in the same standardized NPZ.

csi-bench.note: The official MAT key X is retained and a link axis is inserted when needed.

csida.note: Keep csi_data_pha and all csi_label_* Zarr arrays beside csi_data_amp.

ehunam.note: Null carriers are removed from the CSI/BW/Subcarriers metadata.

exposing-csi.note: The adapter FFT-shifts AX-CSI, removes official null bins, and deinterleaves four monitor streams.

figshare-csi-har.note: Keep label.csv beside data.csv so activity labels are attached automatically.

glasgow-activity-localization.note: The official CSV contains processed USRP-OFDM CSI amplitude.

glasgow-multiuser.note: The class directory is retained as source-label provenance.

mm-fi.note: Place the complete frame*.mat directory; E/S/A identifiers drive environment, subject, and activity metadata.

nist-breathesmart.note: Keep the matching imaginary log and config0001.csv in the same directory.

ntu-fi.note: SenseFi's time-axis downsampling and canonical transpose are applied.

operanet.note: The 270 tx/rx/subcarrier MATLAB-table fields are ordered deterministically.

signfi.note: Complex CSI and lab/home labels are retained.

ut-har.note: NPZ requires data and label arrays; official NumPy-payload .csv files are also supported with a matching label/ tree.

wallhack18k.note: Interleaved imaginary/real samples are parsed and documented ESP32 subcarriers are selected.

wiar.note: The Intel 5300 beamforming records are decoded directly from the official binary format.

widar3.note: This benchmark release stores processed BVP rather than raw CSI.

wifi-80mhz.note: 256/1024-bin CFR traces are converted to 242 carriers and four monitor links.

wifi-presence-movement.note: Gzip JSON Lines are streamed and r/i complex fields are preserved.

wifi-tad.note: Keep the annotations directory beside smartwifi to attach temporal activity segments.

wimans.note: Both official amplitude NPY and raw MAT branches are recognized.

wipe-fall.note: The requested release is amplitude-only; keep risk/trial directories for provenance.

wireless-har-wifi-uwb.note: Only files below WiFi_CSI are converted; the sibling UWB branch is intentionally excluded.

xrf-v2.note: Three receivers and three channels are flattened into nine documented links.

xrf55.note: Only the WiFi modality branch is discovered by this adapter.
